complexity.justification: Random-access indexed read driven by a hard-coded key table, with PERFORM VARYING iteration and error handling

annotation_metadata.note: Every 'lines' range and 'source_snippet' below was checked line-by-line against the uploaded VSCBEX03.cbl using cat -n; paragraph names are the real COBOL paragraph names.

structures.name: PROGRAM_METADATA
structures.source_snippet:
* Program name:    VSCBEX03
* Original author: dastagg
* Description: Example 03: Indexed File Processing: Read Random
structures.confidence_justification: Comment header block is visually delimited by asterisk banners at lines 1 and 22
structures.description: Program header comment block describing purpose, author, and maintenance log

structures.name: IDENTIFICATION
structures.confidence_justification: IDENTIFICATION DIVISION and PROGRAM-ID are explicit COBOL reserved-word headers

structures.name: ENVIRONMENT_DIV
structures.source_snippet:
SELECT CUSTFile
ASSIGN TO "../idata/customer.idat"
ORGANIZATION IS INDEXED
RECORD KEY IS CUSTFile-Cust-ID
ACCESS MODE IS RANDOM
FILE STATUS IS WS-CUSTFile-Status.
structures.confidence_justification: ENVIRONMENT DIVISION / FILE-CONTROL / SELECT are explicit; ACCESS MODE IS RANDOM is unambiguous
structures.description: Declares CUSTFile as an indexed customer file opened for random access, keyed on CUSTFile-Cust-ID

structures.name: DATA_DIV
structures.source_snippet:
DATA DIVISION.
FILE SECTION.
FD  CUSTFile.
    COPY CUSTOMER REPLACING ==:tag:== BY ==CUSTFile==.
...
01  WS-Key-HOLD.
    12 FILLER PIC 9(4) VALUE 0010.
...
01  WS-Key-Table-Storage.
    12 WS-Key-Element-Cnt PIC 9 VALUE 5.
structures.confidence_justification: DATA DIVISION, FILE SECTION, and WORKING-STORAGE SECTION headers are explicit; the hard-coded key table (WS-Key-HOLD/WS-Key-Table-Storage) is a distinguishing feature of this program versus VSCBEX01/02
structures.description: File record layout, file-status/counter working-storage, and a hard-coded table of 5 customer IDs (0010, 0420, 0878, 0210, 0998) redefined into an OCCURS 5 table for random lookups

structures.name: MAINLINE
structures.source_snippet:
PROCEDURE DIVISION.
0000-Mainline.
    PERFORM 1000-Begin-Job.
    PERFORM 2000-Process.
    PERFORM 3000-End-Job.
    GOBACK.
structures.confidence_justification: PROCEDURE DIVISION plus 0000-Mainline paragraph unambiguously mark program entry
structures.description: Program entry point; straight-line perform of begin/process/end phases

structures.name: BEGIN_JOB
structures.source_snippet:
1000-Begin-Job.
    MOVE WS-Key-HOLD  TO WS-Key-Table-Setup.
    OPEN INPUT CUSTFile.
D    DISPLAY "CUSTFile Open Status: " WS-CUSTFile-Status.
structures.confidence_justification: MOVE and OPEN are direct initialization actions with no branching
structures.description: Loads the 5 hard-coded customer IDs into the working key table and opens CUSTFile for random input

structures.name: PROCESS_LOOP
structures.source_snippet:
2000-Process.
    PERFORM VARYING WS-Key-SUB FROM 1 BY 1
       UNTIL WS-Key-SUB > WS-Key-Element-Cnt
       MOVE WS-Key-Value(WS-Key-SUB) TO
          CUSTFile-Cust-ID
       PERFORM 5000-Read-CUSTFile
       DISPLAY "CUSTFile Record: " CUSTFile-Customer-Record
    END-PERFORM.
structures.confidence_justification: PERFORM VARYING...UNTIL...END-PERFORM is explicit indexed-loop syntax
structures.description: Iterates the 5-entry key table, setting the record key and performing a random read for each key, displaying the result inline

structures.name: END_JOB
structures.source_snippet:
3000-End-Job.
    DISPLAY EOJ-End-Message.
    DISPLAY "   Records Read: " FD-CUSTFile-Record-Cnt
    CLOSE CUSTFile.
D    DISPLAY "CUSTFile Close Status: " WS-CUSTFile-Status.
structures.confidence_justification: DISPLAY and CLOSE statements clearly indicate termination/cleanup
structures.description: Displays end-of-job banner and read count, then closes CUSTFile

structures.name: READ_RANDOM
structures.source_snippet:
5000-Read-CUSTFile.
    READ CUSTFile
       RECORD KEY IS CUSTFile-Cust-ID
    END-READ.
    IF WS-CUSTFile-Good
       ADD +1 TO FD-CUSTFile-Record-Cnt
    ELSE
       IF WS-CUSTFile-EOF
          NEXT SENTENCE
       ELSE
          DISPLAY "** ERROR **: 5000-Read-CUSTFile"
          ...
          PERFORM 3000-End-Job
          MOVE 8 TO RETURN-CODE
          GOBACK
       END-IF
    END-IF.
structures.confidence_justification: READ...RECORD KEY IS is explicit random-access syntax, but the paragraph combines success counting, a not-found branch, and a hard-error abend path into one logical unit
structures.description: Performs a keyed random read against CUSTFile using the current key; increments the read counter on success, and on a genuine I/O error (not simple not-found/EOF) logs diagnostics and abends
